name: timeline-element
title: Timeline Element
description: A positioned, trimmable timeline clip: places itself on a track by time (startTime/duration × pixelsPerSecond × zoom, the same basis as timeline-ruler) and renders any content inside — an audio waveform, a thumbnail strip, a label. Selectable, with left/right trim handles that emit the new geometry. The track, playhead, and seeking are left to the consumer.
